name: crypto-scientify
description: Continuous AI research workflow with IACR ePrint support. Best suited for cryptography, PQC, provable security, cryptanalysis, and side-channel research.

interface.shortDescription: Continuous knowledge metabolism for cryptography research with IACR ePrint search.
interface.longDescription: Crypto-Scientify extends Scientify with IACR ePrint search, a crypto-specific adversary review skill (attack vectors for applied/theory/cryptanalysis/SCA modes), and a 40-term pre-audited crypto glossary. Supports metabolism (daily incremental cycles), idea generation, literature collection, implementation, and paper writing.
